quote: Saarthi helped me manage my exam anxiety. The counselors are incredibly supportive and understanding. I went from barely sleeping before exams to feeling confident and prepared.
I was struggling with homesickness and feeling isolated on campus. Through the forum and counseling sessions, I found a community that truly cares. Thank you Saarthi!
The mindfulness resources and plant game kept me engaged with my mental health journey. It made self-care feel fun rather than like a chore. Highly recommend to all students!
As someone who was hesitant about seeking help, Saarthi's anonymous chat feature was a game-changer. It gave me the courage to eventually book a full counseling session.
